TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bsngan Itiniay i Xiulin Cen no Hualien ko Bsngan a niyaro', 532 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,669 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,566 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 103 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku 81%, Amis 3%, Tayal 3%, Bunun 1%, Seediq 1%, roma 4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: b~b~vsŋan itiniaj i xio~u~uɾin ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u b~b~vsŋan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u **%, amis *%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, səəɬ~ɮi* *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Bsngan Itiniay i Xiulin Cen no Hualien ko Bsngan a niyaro', 532 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,669 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,566 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 103 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku 81%, Amis 3%, Tayal 3%, Bunun 1%, Seediq 1%, roma 4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: b~b~vsŋan itiniaj i xio~u~uɾin ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u b~b~vsŋan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u **%, amis *%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, səəɬ~ɮi* *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
